title: MaceAddons
description: If you tired of normal Mace try this mod with many new enchants and an Mace upgrading system
body:
🔨 MaceAddons

Take the Mace to the next level with MaceAddons! Upgrade your weapon, unlock powerful enchantments, and create devastating combat combinations. Whether you prefer mobility, crowd control, explosive power, or raw damage, this mod transforms the Mace into the ultimate weapon.

⚒️ Mace Upgrades

Upgrade your Mace through multiple tiers:

Iron Mace
Gold Mace
Diamond Mace
Netherite Mace

Use the Mace Upgrader Table together with a Mace Upgrader to enhance your weapon and unlock greater power.

✨ Enchantments
Puller

Pulls your target toward you after a successful hit.

Tracker

The opposite of Puller. After a smash, you instantly move a few blocks toward your target.

ComboDamage

Build a combo with every hit. Each combo stack increases your damage. The combo resets at 10 stacks. Higher enchantment levels provide greater bonus damage.

Focus

Marks an enemy as your focused target. Consecutive attacks against the same target deal increasing bonus damage based on the enchantment level.

Burn

Deals additional damage to enemies that are currently burning.

Stunner

Has a chance to inflict Mining Fatigue, Slowness, and Weakness on enemies. Higher levels increase the chance.

Dash

Right-click with your Mace to dash forward. Dash distance and cooldown scale with enchantment level.

PhantomHit

Deals bonus damage based on the target's current health:

Level 1 → 10%
Level 2 → 20%
Level 3 → 30%
Level 4 → 40%
Level 5 → 50%
Adrenaline

Gain a special boost effect after each successful Mace Smash. Effects can stack up to 5 smashes.

Nuke

Charge your Mace through combat. After performing 10 Mace Smashes, right-click to unleash a powerful explosion.

Smasher

Attacks ignore shields and can strike through Totems of Undying, making it a deadly PvP enchantment. If you're hitting with the mace from a very high height, there's little chance the enchantment will work(bc of the balance)

Phase Shift

After hitting an enemy, you temporarily become invisible and invulnerable.

Warning: Wearing armor during Phase Shift is not recommended, as it may be dropped.

Windblast

A manual version of Wind Burst. Launch yourself whenever you want with a right-click.

Gravity Well

Left-click a location to create a gravitational pull. Nearby entities are dragged toward the targeted point.

Kinetic Discharge

Successful Mace Smashes have a chance to release stored kinetic energy, damaging multiple nearby enemies at once.

⚔️ Features

✔ Upgradeable Maces
✔ 14 Unique Enchantments
✔ New Upgrade Station (Mace Upgrader Table)
✔ Powerful PvE & PvP Combat Mechanics
✔ Mobility, Crowd Control & Explosive Abilities
✔ Combo-Based Damage System
✔ Shield & Totem Counterplay
✔ Massive Smash Enhancements

🔥 Forge your Mace. Upgrade your Power. Smash Everything. 🔥

MaceAddons turns the vanilla Mace into a fully customizable weapon packed with unique abilities, powerful upgrades, and endless combat possibilities.

1.21.8 Neoforge version: no Phase Shift
